meta.extracted_from: Next.js 14 / TypeScript / Supabase / Tailwind CSS codebase

app.name: LukeAPI
app.tagline: The AI-Powered API Marketplace That Runs Itself
app.core_problem_solved: Fragmented API ecosystem: providers need months to monetize, developers spend days on integrations, enterprises lack governance and cost visibility across their API spend
app.primary_value_delivered: All-in-one platform combining API discovery, AI code generation, one-click monetization, universal gateway, and enterprise governance — reducing integration from 2 days to 2 minutes
app.one_sentence_description: LukeAPI is an AI-powered API marketplace that lets developers find and integrate APIs in 2 minutes while giving API providers a complete monetization platform and enterprises full governance in one place.

hero_headlines: Find, test, and ship APIs in 2 minutes
Discover, integrate, and monetize APIs in one place
hero_subheadlines: From API discovery to production in 2 minutes. Test before you buy, AI-generated code, one-click monetization, and enterprise governance—all in one place.
Monetize APIs with zero friction. Discover APIs with AI-powered code generation. Govern at enterprise scale.
The only platform with AI, marketplace, gateway, and payments in one.
empty_state_copy: Your activity will appear here as you use the platform
error_messages_revealing_pain: Building payment infrastructure, docs, billing, and analytics takes 6+ months. Most APIs never reach 1000 users.
Testing 10 different payment APIs takes 3 days. Switching providers requires rewriting code. Hidden costs eat budgets.
Shadow IT APIs everywhere. No visibility into $2M+ annual API spend. Security nightmares. Compliance hell.

all_features.name: AI Code Generator
all_features.description: Analyzes API docs and generates production-ready integration code in any language, handling authentication, error handling, retries, and rate limiting automatically
all_features.user_problem_solved: Integration takes 2 days; AI reduces it to 2 minutes with working code

all_features.name: One-Click Monetization
all_features.description: Stripe Connect integration handles subscriptions, usage-based billing, invoicing, and global payouts in minutes
all_features.user_problem_solved: API providers spend months building payment infrastructure; platform handles it all

all_features.name: Developer Playground
all_features.description: Try any API directly in the browser with no coding required — test parameters, see live responses, share with team
all_features.user_problem_solved: Test before you buy — no wasted integration time on APIs that don't fit

all_features.name: Universal API Gateway
all_features.description: Multi-cloud gateway with automatic SSL, DDoS protection, rate limiting, caching, and load balancing
all_features.user_problem_solved: Eliminates multi-cloud gateway complexity with zero config

all_features.name: Auto-Generated Docs
all_features.description: Upload OpenAPI/Swagger spec to instantly generate beautiful interactive docs with code examples in 10 languages
all_features.user_problem_solved: Eliminates the manual documentation burden for API providers

all_features.name: Usage-Based Billing
all_features.description: Automatic metering supporting per-call, tiered, volume discount, and freemium pricing models with automated invoicing
all_features.user_problem_solved: Eliminates the need to build custom billing metering systems

all_features.name: Cost Optimizer
all_features.description: AI analyzes API usage and automatically suggests cheaper alternatives — one-click migration saves 60% on average
all_features.user_problem_solved: Enterprises overpay for APIs; platform surfaces savings opportunities automatically

all_features.name: Compliance Engine
all_features.description: Automatic compliance scanning for GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2 — generates audit reports, manages data retention, handles deletion requests
all_features.user_problem_solved: Enterprises face compliance hell; platform automates GDPR/SOC2 scanning

all_features.name: Smart API Router
all_features.description: AI-optimized routing to fastest/cheapest/most reliable endpoint with failover, circuit breaking, and retry logic
all_features.user_problem_solved: Developers manually handle retry logic and failover; platform automates it

all_features.name: Network Effects Engine
all_features.description: Viral growth mechanics with referral system and marketplace algorithms creating exponential growth flywheel
all_features.user_problem_solved: Bootstrapping a marketplace is hard; built-in virality compounds growth automatically

all_features.name: White-Label Option
all_features.description: Enterprise plan includes custom domain, colors, logo, and internal API marketplace for organizations
all_features.user_problem_solved: Enterprises need branded internal developer portals

all_features.name: Production Readiness Audit
all_features.description: Free quick audit on OpenAPI spec for score and top gaps; Pro/Enterprise get full audit with detailed reports and ship checklist
all_features.user_problem_solved: API providers ship unvalidated specs that break consumers

all_features.name: API Bundles
all_features.description: Curated packs of complementary APIs sold together at a discount
all_features.user_problem_solved: Developers need multiple complementary APIs and prefer bundled pricing

all_features.name: Workflow Builder
all_features.description: Visual workflow builder for orchestrating multi-API integrations
all_features.user_problem_solved: Developers manually chain API calls; visual builder automates multi-step workflows

all_features.name: Semantic Search
all_features.description: AI-powered semantic search across the API marketplace
all_features.user_problem_solved: Keyword search fails to surface relevant APIs; semantic search understands intent

all_features.name: Enterprise SSO / SCIM
all_features.description: SSO integration and SCIM user provisioning for enterprise customers
all_features.user_problem_solved: Enterprises require SSO and automated user lifecycle management

unique_differentiators: AI code generation (unique vs RapidAPI, Stripe Connect, Postman, Kong)
Universal API Gateway + Marketplace + Monetization in one platform
onboarding_flow_steps: For providers: publish first API via OpenAPI spec upload
For consumers: browse marketplace and subscribe to first API
Connect Stripe (providers) or generate API key (consumers)
power_user_workflow: Browse marketplace with semantic search → find relevant API
Test in Developer Playground before subscribing
Subscribe → platform generates AI code snippet for integration
Use Cost Intelligence to identify cheaper alternatives
Set up webhooks for real-time event notifications
Configure governance policies for team-wide API management

audiences.evidence: src/components/landing/ProblemStatement.tsx — 'Testing 10 different payment APIs takes 3 days. Switching providers requires rewriting code. Hidden costs eat budgets.'
audiences.primary_problem: Integration takes too long and vendor lock-in makes switching painful
audiences.job_to_be_done: Integrate APIs quickly, test before buying, and never rewrite code when switching providers

audiences.role_or_type: API Company / SaaS Founder / Developer Tooling Builder
audiences.evidence: src/components/landing/ProblemStatement.tsx — 'Building payment infrastructure, docs, billing, and analytics takes 6+ months. Most APIs never reach 1000 users.'
audiences.primary_problem: Monetizing and distributing an API requires building an entire platform from scratch
audiences.job_to_be_done: Launch a monetized API business with docs, billing, and developer reach in 1 day

audiences.role_or_type: VP Engineering / CTO / Platform Team at Enterprise
audiences.evidence: src/components/landing/ProblemStatement.tsx — 'Shadow IT APIs everywhere. No visibility into $2M+ annual API spend. Security nightmares. Compliance hell.'
audiences.primary_problem: No visibility or control over sprawling API usage across teams, with compliance and cost risks
audiences.job_to_be_done: Get complete API visibility, enforce security policies, and optimize the $2M+ annual API spend

ui_visual.ui_aesthetic: Enterprise SaaS — clean glass-morphism cards with purple-indigo gradient accents, animated bento grid features section, dark hero with constellation background, framer-motion animations throughout
ui_visual.dashboard_description: Card-based enterprise dashboard with gradient left-border accent cards (blue for APIs, emerald for subscribers, amber for revenue, purple for activity), quick action grid, onboarding progress bar, recent activity feed with status badges, and AI-powered recommendations panel
key_ui_components: Hero with animated API constellation background
Bento grid feature cards with hover-expand modals
Competitor comparison table with check/X matrix
Trust badges (SOC2, GDPR, 99.9% Uptime, SSO, MFA)
key_interactive_moments: Feature card click → expand modal with long description and CTA
Value proposition tab switching (Providers/Developers/Enterprises) with typing code animation
API constellation responding to mouse movement
Magnetic button effect on primary CTAs
Problem card hover revealing stat and CTA
ui_visual.empty_state_description: Dashed border card with centered icon, 'No recent activity' headline, and descriptive subtext
ui_visual.loaded_state_description: Dashboard shows gradient accent stat cards, quick action grid with hover lift effects, onboarding progress steps with primary-to-cyan gradient, recent activity list with colored status badges

user_journey.first_screen_after_signup: /verify-email → then /onboarding → then /dashboard with Getting Started checklist
user_journey.aha_moment: Generating working API integration code in 2 minutes via the AI Playground after subscribing to an API — seeing production-ready code appear instantly
common_user_paths: Developer: Landing → Playground demo → Signup → Browse marketplace → Subscribe to API → Generate code → Ship
Provider: Landing → Provider tab → Signup → Publish API (upload OpenAPI spec) → Connect Stripe → Share link → Get subscribers
Enterprise: Landing → Enterprise page → Schedule demo → Custom onboarding → Governance setup → Team-wide API catalog
friction_points_from_code: Email verification required before accessing dashboard
Stripe Connect onboarding required for providers before monetizing
API publishing requires OpenAPI spec upload and admin review before going live
Pro plan checkout redirects to Stripe (external flow)
user_journey.success_state_description: Provider dashboard showing revenue charts, subscriber counts, and published APIs. Consumer dashboard showing active subscriptions, API call success rates, and cost intelligence savings opportunities.
user_journey.before_product_state: Developer spending 3 days integrating APIs, rewriting code for each provider, paying for 5 separate tools. Provider spending 6+ months building payment infrastructure that still reaches fewer than 1000 users. Enterprise with no visibility into $2M+ API spend and compliance violations.
user_journey.after_product_state: Developer integrating any API in 2 minutes with AI-generated code, switching providers without code changes. Provider monetizing in 1 day with built-in billing, docs, and 100K+ developer reach. Enterprise with 100% API visibility, 40% cost savings, and automated compliance.

integrations.payment_provider: Stripe (Stripe Connect for provider payouts, Stripe Checkout for subscriptions, Stripe webhooks, usage-based billing)
integrations.auth_provider: Supabase Auth (email/password, GitHub OAuth, Google OAuth, SSO/SAML via organizations, SCIM provisioning)
analytics_tools: Custom Supabase-based analytics (page_views, cta_clicks, feature_demo_interactions tables)
apis_connected_or_exposed: Anthropic Claude API (AI code generation, playground, explanations)
integrations.target_sophistication_signal: High — uses TypeScript strict mode, OpenAPI spec parsing, SCIM provisioning, GraphQL proxy, Redis rate limiting, GDPR deletion flows, SOC2 compliance scanning, Playwright E2E tests, k6 load tests

pricing_tiers.name: Free
pricing_tiers.key_limits: 10,000 API calls/month, 50 AI code generations/day, basic analytics, community support

pricing_tiers.name: Pro
pricing_tiers.key_limits: 1M API calls/month, unlimited AI code generation

business_model.primary_conversion_event: Signup → Pro plan upgrade via /api/platform/checkout with Stripe Checkout
monetization_triggers: 10,000 API calls/month limit hit on Free tier
50 AI generations/day limit hit on Free tier
Provider wanting to monetize APIs (requires Stripe Connect)
business_model.revenue_model: SaaS subscription (Free/Pro/$99/mo/Enterprise custom) + usage-based billing on API calls + Stripe Connect platform fees on provider transactions + Enterprise custom contracts

implicit_alternatives: Building custom payment infrastructure in-house (6+ month path)
Using separate tools: RapidAPI (marketplace) + Postman (testing) + Kong (gateway) + Stripe Connect (billing)
unique_capabilities_from_code: AI code generation (only platform with this vs RapidAPI, Stripe Connect, Postman, Kong)
Cost Optimizer with auto-switch to cheaper providers (unique across all competitors)
AI-powered semantic search (unique across all competitors)
White-label portal with custom domain middleware rewriting
Production readiness audit with OpenAPI spec scoring
Network effects flywheel (referral system built into marketplace mechanics)
competitive_context.positioning_statement: The only all-in-one platform with AI code generation, marketplace discovery, usage-based monetization, universal gateway, and enterprise governance — replace 5 separate tools with one.

video_content_recommendations.highest_priority_video: Developer transformation story: 'I used to spend 3 days integrating APIs. Now it takes 2 minutes.' — show the AI playground generating working code, subscribe to an API, paste code, ship.
video_content_recommendations.strongest_before_after: Before: Developer copying docs, writing boilerplate auth/retry/error handling for 2 days. After: Type what you need in the AI playground, get production-ready code in 2 minutes, ship.
video_content_recommendations.most_visual_feature: AI Playground — watching code appear in real-time as AI generates a complete, working integration is visually compelling and immediately demonstrates the core value
video_content_recommendations.best_hook_angle: 'Your last API integration took 2 days. This one takes 2 minutes.' — open on a timer/stopwatch visual contrast
video_content_recommendations.target_emotion: Relief and excitement — the feeling of finally having the tools that remove the drudgery from API integration
video_content_recommendations.suggested_character_archetype: Senior developer or tech lead who has shipped a lot of products but is tired of repeating the same integration boilerplate — someone who values their time and wants to focus on product, not plumbing
video_content_recommendations.suggested_environment: Modern home office or tech startup office — screen recording of the platform in action with picture-in-picture of developer reactions
messages_ranked_by_impact: 2 minutes vs 2 days — AI code generation transforms API integration speed
Replace 5 tools with 1 — stop paying for RapidAPI + Postman + Kong + Stripe + custom billing
6 months to 1 day — API providers can monetize immediately without building payment infrastructure
40% cost savings — enterprises get AI-powered cost optimization across all API spend
Test before you buy — developer playground eliminates wasted integration time on wrong APIs
Enterprise governance — complete visibility into shadow IT APIs and $2M+ annual spend
screens_worth_recording: Hero landing page with live API constellation animation
AI Playground generating code in real-time
Developer playground testing an API with live response
API subscription flow (browse → subscribe → get API key)
Provider publishing flow (upload OpenAPI spec → auto-generated docs → Stripe connect)
Cost intelligence dashboard showing before/after savings
Competitor comparison table (all green checkmarks for our platform)
Dashboard overview with stats and quick actions
Getting Started checklist completing in sequence
